igbo.reflected_over_x_axis: E gosipụtara ya na axis x
igbo.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Ihe na-ese eserese function. Ụzọ mkpirisi keyboard: 1 ruo 6 na-ahọrọ ụdị function, D derivative, A mpaghara, T tebụl, L mụta.
igbo.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Ebe function na-agafe axis x. Na isi ndị a, f(x) = 0. Ịchọta mgbọrọgwụ dị mkpa na algebra na calculus.
igbo.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Ebe function na-agafe axis y. Nke a bụ ụkpụrụ nke f(0) — naanị tinye x = 0.
igbo.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Mkpọda na-agwa gị otú function si dị mkpọda na isi ọ bụla. Ahịrị tangent na-emetụ curve na isi otu. Jiri trace slider nyocha!
igbo.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative na-atụ ọnụọgụ mgbanwe. Gbanye ya ka ị hụ otú mkpọda si agbanwe na function. Ebe f′(x) = 0, function nwere ụkpụrụ kachasị elu ma ọ bụ kachasị ala nke mpaghara.
igbo.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Mpaghara ndò na-anọchi anya integral — «mkpokọta» mkpokọta nke f(x). Na ndụ n'ezie, nke a nwere ike ịpụtara anya ejere, ike ejiri, ma ọ bụ puru omume.
igbo.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Mgbe a > 0, parabola na-emeghe elu (⏣). Mgbe a < 0, ọ na-emeghe ala (⏢). Vertex bụ isi ntụgharị. Nwaa gbanwee 'a' hụ!
igbo.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) na-achịkwa ịdị elu, frequency (b) na-achịkwa ọnụọgụ cycles, phase shift (c) na-akpụ wave akaekpe/akanri. Period = 2π/b.
igbo.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: site n'iji okwu kwa ụbọchị dị mfe na ahịrịokwu mkpirikpi, na-enweghị okwu ọkachamara
igbo.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: maka nwa akwụkwọ sekọndrị nke algebra ma ọ bụ pre-calc, na okwu ndị dị ka mkpọda, ebe na-agafe, vertex, period, na amplitude
igbo.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Pịa «Kọwaa» ka onye nkuzi AI kọwaa function a n'ọkwa ọgụgụ ị họọrọ.
igbo.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Ụlọ anụ function — ọdịdị function isii a na-ahụkarị
igbo.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders maka amplitude, frequency, phase. Nkewa discrete nke ọnọdụ 5. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta.
igbo.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Echiche: Kedu ka phase shift si emetụta wave a na-ahụ anya?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta waves yiri onwe ha n'anya.
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke gị
igbo.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Kọwaa otú parameter ọ bụla si etụ sine wave.
igbo.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Ndetu imewe: akara discrete nke ọnọdụ 5; enweghị akara wave; enweghị ngosipụta — site n'imewe.
